activities.title: WAICA研讨会·人工智能驱动的量子计算
activities.title_en: WAICA Workshop: AI Acceleration in Quantum Computing
activities.description: 本次 WAICA “人工智能驱动的量子计算加速” Workshop 聚焦于下一代异构计算体系架构的前沿演进。我们关注如何跨越经典与量子的物理边界，着眼于量子计算在高维空间与复杂优化中的底层潜能。我们的报告涵盖量子计算，量子信息，量子通信，量子调控，量子人工智能，QPU 与超算集群等话题。我们致力于将硬核的架构革新与理论探讨转化为跨界叙事，以汇聚广泛的产业共识，加速量子-人工智能融合走向真正的工程落地。
activities.description_en: The WAICA "AI Acceleration in Quantum Computing" Workshop focuses on the frontier evolution of next-generation heterogeneous computing architectures. We are dedicated to bridging the physical boundaries between classical and quantum systems, highlighting the fundamental potential of quantum computing in high-dimensional spaces and complex optimization. Our sessions cover a comprehensive range of topics, including quantum computing, quantum information, quantum communication, quantum control, quantum artificial intelligence, as well as QPU and supercomputing clusters. Ultimately, we are committed to translating hardcore architectural innovations and theoretical discussions into a cross-disciplinary narrative, aiming to forge broad industry consensus and accelerate the transition of Quantum-AI integration toward real-world engineering applications.

activities.title: WAICA研讨会·天基智能计算
activities.title_en: WAICA Workshop: Frontiers of Space-Based Intelligent Computing
activities.description: 本论坛聚焦空间智能计算前沿，围绕大模型轻量化、多智能体协同与天地一体化网络，探讨从地面AI向自主空间边缘智能的跨越。卫星星座与星上处理赋予地球观测、灾害应急等新能力，但资源受限、高时延、动态拓扑及安全威胁构成严峻挑战。论坛汇聚AI、航天与通信领域研究者，交流星上高效推理、星地联邦学习、通算感融合等创新架构与在轨实践，旨在突破技术瓶颈，推动构建弹性、智能的空间生态系统。诚邀各位同仁共探未来空天智能之路。
activities.description_en: This workshop focuses on the frontier of spatial intelligent computing, centering around lightweight large models, multi-agent collaboration, and integrated space-earth networks, exploring the leap from terrestrial AI to autonomous spatial edge intelligence. Satellite constellations and on-board processing endow Earth observation, disaster emergency response, and other fields with new capabilities, but resource constraints, high latency, dynamic topology, and security threats pose severe challenges. The forum brings together researchers from the fields of AI, aerospace, and communications to exchange innovative architectures and on-orbit practices such as efficient on-board inference, satellite-earth federated learning, and the fusion of computing and sensing, aiming to break through technological bottlenecks and promote the construction of a resilient and intelligent spatial ecosystem. We sincerely invite all colleagues to explore the future path of space-earth intelligence together.

activities.title: WAIC·Amplified Individual 在AI中看见具体的人（深耕与守望）
activities.title_en: Amplified Individual: Seeing the Individual in AI (Depth and Endurance)
activities.description:
下午场，在最动人的故事里，听见最前沿的技术风向。
下一代算力架构、具身智能、科学智能、脑机接口、AI教育、能源——没有参数轰炸，没有术语围墙。
你会听到的，是这些硬核技术背后，一次次的试错和重来；是实验室里真实的欢呼，和更真实的沉默。也会听到，那些闪光时刻背后，具体的犹豫和具体的坚持。
技术也许很远，但做技术的人很近。
activities.description_en:
In the afternoon session, we turn the lens from the spotlight of technology to the specific figures behind it. 

In the frontier of hard tech, some send optical chips to space, others give robots true touch, and some push humanoid robots into factory floors—they are light-chasers, path-breakers, and practitioners. 

In the arena of life, some make rare diseases no longer rare, others rebuild connections between patients and the world via brain-computer interfaces, and some sow the future in the uncharted territory of AI-native education—they are guardians, guides, and explorers. 

At the farther frontiers, some bet on a tomorrow where energy is no longer contested, with AI and physics; returned physicists probe the boundaries of quantum and computation; some pass the torch between academia and investment; and some orchestrate the entire World Artificial Intelligence Conference behind the scenes—they are dreamers, connectors, and operators.

activities.title: WAIC·思想者论坛 朱松纯专场
activities.title_en: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum Prof.Songchun,Zhu
activities.description:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
activities.description_en:
Column Name: WAIC Thinkers Forum
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governa

activities.search_text:
waic·思想者论坛 朱松纯专场 waic thought leaders forum prof.songchun,zhu 人才生态 红厅 red hall 世博中心 expo center 核心主题：ai 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 waic 顶层核心高端思想 ip，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 waic 全球 ai 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。 朱松纯 蒋昌建 waic 组委会

activities.title: 大晓机器人·世界模型驱动物理 AI 从理解到执行论坛
activities.title_en: World Model-Driven Physical AI Forum: From Understanding to Execution
activities.description:
WAIC 2026世界模型"六小龙"巅峰论坛由世界人工智能大会组委会主办、大晓机器人承办，以驱动物理AI从理解到执行为主题，是大会唯一聚焦世界模型与具身智能深度融合的核心论坛，旨在定义并开启物理AI的开悟时刻。
大晓机器人董事长王晓刚将呈现环境式数采—开悟世界模型—行业级解决方案全栈实践，展示开悟世界模型端侧直驱本体、反思自进化，落地零售、酒店及开放场景等。
国内世界模型“六小龙”企业技术掌舵人首度同台，六条技术路线正面交锋，共探从认知推演通往物理执行的破局之路。
论坛还将联合发布Physical IQ物智——具身物理智能统一评测平台，以真实场景评测界定机器人能力边界，推动行业标准共建。
activities.description_en:
The WAIC 2026 World Model “Six Dragons” Summit Forum, hosted by the WAIC Organizing Committee and organized by ACE Robotics, is themed “Driving Physical AI from Understanding to Execution.” As WAIC’s only core forum on world models and embodied intelligence, it aims to usher in Physical AI’s Enlightenment Moment.
ACE Robotics Chairman Wang Xiaogang will present its full-stack practice—“Ambient Capture Engine—Kairos World Model—Industry-Grade Solutions”—showcasing on-device robot control, reflection-driven self-evolution, and deployment in retail, hospitality, and open scenarios.
Technology leaders from China’s six representative world model companies will share the stage for the first time, exploring the path from cognitive reasoning to physical execution.
The forum will also launch Physical IQ, a unified benchmark platform that evaluates robot capabilities in real-world scenarios and advances shared industry standards.

activities.title: 骨码智元实验室·人工智能高质量语料生态论坛
activities.title_en: GOMAX LAB High-Quality AI Corpora Ecosystem Forum
activities.description: 本次论坛以“全球专家·极致语料”为主题，GOMAX LAB骨码智元实验室汇聚数十位院士、国际头部科技企业数据专家及全球一线投资机构，共同研讨科学智能与产业智能赛道高质量语料的发展路径与产业落地方案。现场将分享全球前沿数据语料行业观点，集中发布多领域高质量数据集落地成果与完整产业发展路线图。
activities.description_en: GOMAX LAB presents a high-level forum under the theme “Global Minds · Premium Corpora.” It will convene a distinguished group of academicians, data experts from the world’s leading technology companies, and representatives of premier global investment institutions to shape the future of high-quality corpora for AI for Science and industrial intelligence. The forum will feature leading global perspectives on the AI corpus ecosystem, the launch of high-quality datasets designed for real-world use across multiple domains, and a comprehensive roadmap for industry development.

activities.title: 启明创投·创业与投资论坛 从算力原点到应用落地的进化征程
activities.title_en: Qiming Venture Partners · Entrepreneurship and Investment Forum  From Silicon Origins to Real-World Implementation: An Evolutionary Odyssey
activities.description:
作为中国创业投资行业的深度参与者与技术变革的长期守望者，启明创投连续第四年亮相WAIC。本次论坛以“从算力原点到应用落地的进化征程”为主题，站在技术周期的关键转折点，深度剖析AI如何从底层的算力竞赛转向系统性的价值创造。
论坛将汇聚顶尖科学家、创新领袖与资深投资人，共同解码大模型时代的范式转移：探讨行业如何跨越单纯的参数追求，转向对实际场景、降本增效以及商业模式闭环的极致探索。
我们将继续发挥在“深科技”领域的深耕优势，通过高规格的对话与前瞻洞察，赋能创业者跨越技术与产业之间的鸿沟。在 AI 生产力爆发的新篇章中，与全球创新者共同见证人工智能从“技术理想”向“产业引擎”的终极进化。
activities.description_en: A premier player in China’s VC landscape and a long-term observer of tech shifts, Qiming Venture Partners returns to WAIC for the fourth consecutive year. This year’s forum, “From Silicon Origins to Real-world Implementation: An Evolutionary Odyssey,” arrives at a pivotal moment in the tech cycle, examining AI’s shift from compute arms race to systemic value creation. The forum will bring together top scientists, entrepreneurs, and investors to decode the paradigm shift. Join us in witnessing AI’s transformation—from visionary ideal to industrial engine.

activities.title: 上海市节能中心·人工智能与产业绿色低碳转型创新发展论坛
activities.title_en: “AI + Green and Low-Carbon Transformation” Innovation and Development Forum
activities.description: 2026年是“十五五”开局之年，也是能耗双控向碳排放双控全面转型的关键期。能碳数据的可信、安全与互认已成为国际竞争的战略刚需。人工智能技术的爆发式发展，为能碳数智化管理、产业绿色化升级提供了全新范式。国家“十五五”绿色制造新规明确动态退出、细分标准扩容等改革方向，上海正加速构建绿色低碳智能体集群。本论坛聚焦AI赋能产业绿色化与绿色产业化双向跃迁，推动数智向绿、绿智协同。
activities.description_en: The 2026 WAIC "AI+Green Low-Carbon Transformation" Forum, themed "Smart Energy & Carbon, Green New Journey," will bring together global experts, industry leaders, and policymakers to explore AI-driven pathways for smart energy-carbon management and industrial green upgrading. The Forum will unveil Shanghai’s "AI+Intelligent Energy and Carbon Spatial Core Platform," focusing on green manufacturing agents, showcasing their latest achievements in energy saving, carbon reduction, and investment attraction, and host a signing ceremony for the AI+Green Manufacturing Innovation Ecosystem. Committed to turning "digital intelligence computing power" into "green potential," the Forum aims to foster bidirectional empowerment between AI and green transformation, contributing solutions to address international green trade barriers and achieve carbon peak and neutrality.

activities.title: 物理智能创新生态论坛
activities.title_en: Physical Intelligence Innovation Ecosystem Forum
activities.description: 当前，人工智能正经历从数字世界走向物理世界的决定性跨越。物理AI作为连接虚拟仿真、基础模型、终端硬件与真实场景的关键技术，正成为赋能实体经济、培育未来产业的重要基础能力。由飞捷科思智能科技（上海）有限公司发起的“2026 WAIC中国物理智能产业发展论坛”，将汇聚物理 AI 领域的顶尖高校、科研机构、领军企业与行业伙伴等，通过打造高水平学术交流、标准评测与产学研协同创新平台，推动物理AI关键技术从单点突破走向系统协同，从企业创新走向行业共建，加速科研成果与产业需求精准对接，推动校企合作与人才流动，助力构建自主可控、规范发展的中国物理智能创新生态，推动物理AI前沿技术加速落地应用。
activities.description_en: Artificial intelligence is making a decisive leap from the digital to the physical world. As the key technology bridging virtual simulation, foundation models, terminal hardware, and real-world applications, Physical AI is becoming a foundational driver of the real economy and future industries. Hosted by Fysics Intelligent Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., the "2026 WAIC China Physical AI Industry Development Forum" will convene leading universities, research institutions, pioneering enterprises, and industry partners. Through high-level academic exchange, standardized evaluation, and industry-university-research collaboration, the forum aims to advance Physical AI from isolated breakthroughs to systemic collaboration, and from corporate innovation to industry-wide co-creation — accelerating research-to-market alignment, fostering talent mobility, and helping build a self-reliant, well-regulated Physical AI innovation ecosystem in China.

activities.title: 西部数据·面向AI时代的数据存储架构创新论坛
activities.title_en: Data Storage Architecture Innovation for the AI Era Forum
activities.description: 在算力成为焦点的同时，作为底座的存储如何实现协同演进？我们将汇聚从存储、算力、安全到行业应用的全产业链代表，通过务实的产业对话，为AI基础设施的协同建设提供可参考的实践路径。
activities.description_en: While compute power has taken center stage, how can storage — the foundation — evolve in synergy with it? We bring together representatives from the entire AI industry chain — storage, compute, security, and industry applications — to engage in pragmatic industry dialogue, delivering actionable and referenceable pathways for the collaborative development of AI infrastructure.

activities.title: 先进计算网络与算电协同论坛
activities.title_en: Advanced Computing Network & Compute-Electricity Synergy
activities.description:
论坛由院士领衔，围绕新一代人工智能基础设施这一战略命题，汇聚鹏城国家实验室、怀柔国家实验室、北京智源人工智能研究院、中国移动等政产学研顶尖力量，从Z级算力、P级光网络、GW级电力三大维度展开深度研讨。
议题涵盖算网融合、众智计算、算电协同、Token经济、世界模型等前沿热点。论坛将发布百T千公里新型光纤直连验证平台、驭算WSF平台、中科类脑算电OS三大年度重磅成果，并签署先进网络内蒙古科技合作、国产生态联盟、"一带一路"Token出海联盟等战略合作协议，直面AI基础设施的核心挑战与破解路径，完整呈现从技术攻关到商业落地的全链路实践。
activities.description_en:
Hosted by Pengcheng National Laboratory, co-organized by Yusuan Intelligence and Hefei Zhongke Leibao. Led by prominent academicians, the forum convenes Pengcheng Lab, Huairou National Lab, BAAI, China Mobile, and other top institutions. Discussions span Z-scale computing, P-band optical networks, and GW-level grids, covering computing-network convergence, crowd-sourced computing, computing-electricity synergy, the Token economy, and world models.
The forum will unveil three landmark achievements: a 100T/1000km fiber-optic verification platform, the Yusuan WSF (World State Foundry), and the Zhongke Leibao Computing-Electricity OS. Strategic agreements will be signed for the Inner Mongolia Research Institute, a domestic ecosystem alliance, and the Belt & Road Token Go-Global Alliance—presenting a full chain from R&D breakthroughs to commercial deployment.

activities.title: 猿编程·让孩子未来驾驭AI 青少年人工智能教育论坛
activities.title_en: Youth Artificial Intelligence Education Development Forum
activities.description:
当AI重构认知边界、重塑成长逻辑，我们诚邀您共赴一场洞见时代、确立育人航向的思想盛会。
猿编程将登陆 2026 世界人工智能大会，重磅启幕「WAIC 2026 青少年AI教育论坛」。大会特邀世界著名未来学家、科技预言家凯文・凯利前瞻时代走向，《最强大脑》科学评审、北京大学心理与认知科学学院教授魏坤琳深挖青少年成长本源，猿编程创始人、清华大学心理与认知科学系AI教育研究中心学术委员会副主任李翊分享AI教育前沿实践，立足全球顶层视野，剖解AI时代教育的根本命题。
本次大会，猿编程将官宣品牌全面焕新，重磅发布以5A素养体系为内核的下一代育人范式，搭建贯通校园普惠课堂、家庭长效培育的全域AI教育体系，
activities.description_en:
When AI reconstructs cognitive boundaries and reshapes the logic of growth, we sincerely invite you to an ideological event to understand the times and establish the direction of education.

Ape programming will be launched at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, with a grand opening of the "WAIC 2026 Youth AI Education Forum". The conference specially invited Kevin Kelly, a world-famous futurist and science and technology prophet, to look forward to the trend of the times. Wei Kunlin, a scientific reviewer of "The Strongest Brain", a professor of the School of Psychological and Cognitive Sciences of Peking University, to dig deep into the origin of the growth of adolescents, the founder of ape programming, and an academic committee member of the AI Education Research Centre of the Department of Psychology and Cognitive Science of Tsinghua University. activities.search_text:
猿编程·让孩子未来驾驭ai 青少年人工智能教育论坛 youth artificial intelligence education development forum 民生福祉-教育 515会议室 conference room 515 世博中心 expo center 当ai重构认知边界、重塑成长逻辑，我们诚邀您共赴一场洞见时代、确立育人航向的思想盛会。
猿编程将登陆 2026 世界人工智能大会，重磅启幕「waic 2026 青少年ai教育论坛」。大会特邀世界著名未来学家、科技预言家凯文・凯利前瞻时代走向，《最强大脑》科学评审、北京大学心理与认知科学学院教授魏坤琳深挖青少年成长本源，猿编程创始人、清华大学心理与认知科学系ai教育研究中心学术委员会副主任李翊分享ai教育前沿实践，立足全球顶层视野，剖解ai时代教育的根本命题。
本次大会，猿编程将官宣品牌全面焕新，重磅发布以5a素养体系为内核的下一代育人范式，搭建贯通校园普惠课堂、家庭长效培育的全域ai教育体系， 李翊 魏坤琳 凯文·凯利 猿编程 世界人工智能大会组委会办公室

activities.title: 中国年度AI人物·巅峰对话
activities.title_en: China Annual AI Figures · Summit Dialogue
activities.description: “中国年度AI人物·巅峰对话”是中央广播电视总台《2026中国·AI盛典》的核心品牌活动，于2026世界人工智能大会期间在上海西岸穹顶艺术中心举办。作为中国AI领域最具公信力与影响力的年度思想盛会之一，活动依托“2026年度AI人物”推选体系，汇聚多位AI领域院士专家及“年度AI人物”，围绕开源生态构建、产业深度融合、科学前沿探索等维度展开深度对话。活动旨在搭建一个政产学研跨界交流的高端平台，以思想碰撞激发行业共识，以年度人物树立行业标杆，为推动“人工智能+”行动走深走实贡献智慧力量。
activities.description_en: “China Annual AI Figures · Summit Dialogue” is the flagship event of CMG“2026 China AI Gala”. It will take place at the West Bund Dome Art Center in Shanghai during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). As one of the most credible and influential annual thought-leadership gatherings in China’s AI sector, the event is built upon the “2026 Annual AI Figures” selection system. It brings together distinguished academicians, experts, and the selected “Annual AI Figures” for in-depth dialogues across three key dimensions: open-source ecosystem development, deep industry integration, and frontier scientific exploration. The Summit aims to forge a high-end cross-sector platform bridging government, industry, academia, and research — sparking industry-wide consensus through intellectual exchange, setting benchmarks through its annual honorees, and contributing strategic insights to drive the solid and substantive advancement of the “AI+” initiative.

activities.venue_en: WEST BUND DOME,No. 2350 Longteng Avenue, Xuhui District, Shanghai

activities.title: 中金公司· 共建全球科技金融伙伴新生态投融资论坛
activities.title_en: Co-creating a New Global Ecosystem for Technology–Finance Partnerships- CICC Investment and Financing  Forum
activities.description: 当前人工智能（AI）作为新一轮通用技术革命的重要引擎，正加速从技术突破走向产业应用。推动AI开放合作，关键在于携手全球AI产业伙伴，促进技术、产业、资本和市场高效连接，让智能技术转化为更广泛的产业生产力。随着AI技术扩散，研发投入、应用落地、跨境合作、并购整合、风险管理等金融需求不断涌现，科技金融将成为支撑AI企业成长和产业生态发展的重要力量。本次论坛将邀请产业、金融、科技企业及国际合作伙伴代表，共同探讨金融机构如何发挥产业伙伴连接者、长期资本配置者、企业成长陪伴者、风险管理专家和国际合作桥梁作用，为科技型企业提供全链条、全生命周期金融服务，共同推动智能技术扩散和产业高质量发展。
activities.description_en: As a core engine of the new general technological revolution, AI is rapidly shifting from technological breakthrough to industrial application.To advance open AI cooperation, we must work with global industry partners to connect technology,industry,capital and markets efficiently,turning smart technologies into broader industrial productivity.With the proliferation of AI, growing financial demands have emerged in R&D,commercialization, cross-border cooperation,M&A and risk management.Tech finance has therefore become a key force supporting AI enterprises and industrial ecosystem development.This forum brings together representatives from industry,finance,tech sectors and global partners to explore how financial institutions can act as industrial connector,long-term capital allocator,growth companion,risk management expert and international cooperation bridge and jointly promote AI diffusion and high-quality industrial development.

activities.title: 欧莱雅集团 · AI向美论坛
activities.title_en: L’Oréal Groupe · AI for Beauty Forum
activities.description: 2026年7月19日下午14:15—16:00，欧莱雅将在世界人工智能大会（WAIC）Future Tech舞台呈现一场 “AI向美”主题活动。活动融合大咖主旨演讲、战略合作签约、黑客松赛事发布,并呈现首个特别论坛秀，汇聚各领域嘉宾，从消费者、组织与社会三个维度，共同探讨AI如何真正服务于人、成就于美，展现欧莱雅在“AI向美”理念下人与AI的双向奔赴，以及欧莱雅全球创新成果与中国独特科技生态相融合的美之历程，生动诠释“‘美’一程，有你有AI”欧莱雅参展主题。
activities.description_en: On July 19, 2026, from 2:15 PM to 4:00 PM, L'Oréal will host a event titled “AI For Beauty” on the Future Tech stage at WAIC. Featuring keynote speeches, partnership signing, the launch of the 2nd Beauty Techathon and the first-ever special panel, bringing together distinguished speakers from across industries, decoding “AI for Beauty” across consumers, métier + employees and society: How technology serves humanity and elevates beauty. The event highlighs a journey that fusing L'Oréal’s global breakthroughs with China’s unique tech landscape, bringing a deeper emphasis on human warmth and empathy, bringing to life the theme “AI Powered Beauty Odyssey”.

activities.title: WAIC·思想者论坛 俞勇专场
activities.title_en: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum Prof.YuYong
activities.description: 人工智能时代，真正决定未来的不是技术，而是能够创造技术的人。上海交通大学ACM班创始人、著名计算机教育家俞勇教授，将结合四十余年教育实践，分享人才培养的第一性原理。俞勇教授始终坚持”培养计算机科学家，而非仅培养程序员”的理念，构建科研驱动、实践导向的人才培养体系。ACM班培养了众多活跃于全球AI前沿的青年科学家与产业领军人才，其中谢赛宁与图灵奖得主Yann LeCun共同创立AMI Labs，探索下一代人工智能。众多毕业生活跃于OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta、微软、字节跳动等机构，持续推动全球人工智能创新。
activities.description_en:
Artificial intelligence will ultimately be shaped not by technology itself, but by the people who create it. In this keynote, Professor Yu Yong, Founder of the ACM Honors Program at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, shares insights from more than four decades of experience in computer science education, exploring the first principles of talent development in the AI era.
Guided by the philosophy of “cultivating computer scientists rather than merely training programmers,” Professor Yu has built one of China’s most influential talent programs. Its alumni include Saining Xie, who co-founded AMI Labs with Turing Award laureate Yann LeCun, as well as many researchers and engineering leaders at OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta, Microsoft, and ByteDance.
This session explores how curiosity, independent thinking, and long-term vision can cultivate the innovators who will shape the future of artificial intelligence.

activities.title: 量坤科技·量超智融合论坛
activities.title_en: Field Quantum · Quantum-HPC-AI Integration Forum
activities.description: WAIC 2026 | 量坤科技「量超智融合论坛」——「量」量子算法能力对齐IBM，发布国内首个量子纠错白皮书；「超」自研BP纠错解码器4–12×英伟达，量子计算经典模拟器性能2-4×英伟达；「智」AI4S生成算法国际基准第一，科研智能体全流程自动化。三线融合，重磅发布量启AI Agent——国内首个量子智能体平台，旗下元材智库、fieldqkit（五大云统一SDK）同步亮相。产品将落地生物医药、新材料、锂电、高温超导等应用领域，研发周期缩短70%+。量子计算产业化，量坤正以融合之力，定义新范式。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
activities.description_en: WAIC 2026 | FieldQuantum's "Quantum-HPC-AI Fusion Forum" — "Quantum": algorithm capabilities on par with IBM, with the release of China's first quantum error correction white paper; "HPC": proprietary BP error correction decoder delivering 4–12× over NVIDIA, classical quantum simulator achieving 2–4× NVIDIA performance; "AI": AI4S generative algorithm ranked #1 on international benchmarks, with fully automated scientific research agents. Three pillars converge in the launch of Qira AI Agent — China's first quantum intelligent agent platform — alongside sub-products Material Hub and fieldqkit (a unified SDK compatible with five major quantum clouds). Deployed across biopharma, advanced materials, lithium batteries, high-temperature superconductors, and more, accelerating R&D cycles by over 70%. Quantum computing is entering the industrial era — and FieldQuantum is defining the new paradigm through the power of convergence.

activities.title: WAIC UP! 2026青年观察家夜场活动
activities.title_en: WAIC UP! 2026 Youth Observer Night Event
activities.description: 作为“WAIC UP! 2026青年观察家·思享会”的夜间延伸单元，我们将白天的理性思辨延续至夜幕之下，打造一个更开放、多元、沉浸式的青年交流场域。白天的议程交给思想碰撞，夜晚则留给体验与连接——在这里，你可以参与“Agent创意风暴”，与虚拟身份组队激发跨界灵感；加入“开发者派对 · AI桌游实战”，在策略博弈中解锁技术社交的新玩法；也能投身“AI公益行动”，聆听3000公里外的火种故事，用科技温暖照进现实。多重视角，一夜交融，让思想在夜色中升温，让连接在共创中发生。
activities.description_en: As the nighttime extension of the "WAIC UP! 2026 Youth Observers · Ideas Share," we carry the day's rational discourse into the night, creating a more open, diverse, and immersive space for youth exchange. The daytime agenda is devoted to intellectual collision, while the night is reserved for experience and connection. Here, you can dive into the "Agent Creative Storm," teaming up with virtual identities to spark cross-boundary inspiration; join the "Developer Party · AI Board Game Battle," where strategic gameplay unlocks new dimensions of tech-social interaction; and take part in the "AI Public Welfare Action," hearing stories of the "spark" carried across 3,000 kilometers, as technology brings warmth to reality. Through multiple perspectives woven into one night, let ideas rise with the evening glow, and let connections flourish through co-creation.

activities.search_text: waic up! 2026青年观察家夜场活动 waic up! 2026 youth observer night event 人才生态 1a会议室 conference room 1a 世博展览馆 expo exhibition and convention center 作为“waic up! 2026青年观察家·思享会”的夜间延伸单元，我们将白天的理性思辨延续至夜幕之下，打造一个更开放、多元、沉浸式的青年交流场域。白天的议程交给思想碰撞，夜晚则留给体验与连接——在这里，你可以参与“agent创意风暴”，与虚拟身份组队激发跨界灵感；加入“开发者派对 · ai桌游实战”，在策略博弈中解锁技术社交的新玩法；也能投身“ai公益行动”，聆听3000公里外的火种故事，用科技温暖照进现实。多重视角，一夜交融，让思想在夜色中升温，让连接在共创中发生。 上海东浩兰生威客引力信息科技有限公司

activities.title: WAICA研讨会·具身智能空间交互
activities.title_en: Spacial Intelligence for Embodied AI
activities.description: “具身智能空间交互”论坛的举办，是希望通过学术界和工业界专家学者的交流，推动人工智能正从数字世界迈向物理空间的关键跨越。当前，人机交互长期受限于二维屏幕的桎梏，而人与人的交流本质上是三维、自然且充满空间感的。本论坛旨在突破这一瓶颈，聚焦于如何让机器人摆脱屏幕，通过多模态感知、空间计算和触觉反馈等前沿技术，实现与人类在三维空间中的自然交互。这不仅将解决具身智能落地中最欠缺的交互体验问题，更将催生新一代的空间计算芯片、柔性电子皮肤和沉浸式应用场景，从工业制造、医疗手术到日常陪伴，重塑人机关系，为社会带来深远变革。
activities.description_en: The establishment of the workshop on Spatial Interaction for Embodied Intelligent hopes to make a pivotal leap for artificial intelligence from the digital world into physical space. Currently, human-machine interaction remains constrained by the limitations of two-dimensional screens, whereas human communication is inherently three-dimensional, natural, and spatially rich. This forum aims to break through this bottleneck by focusing on how robots can transcend screens and achieve natural interaction with humans in 3D space through cutting-edge technologies such as multimodal perception, spatial computing, and haptic feedback. This will not only address the most critical gap in embodied AI deployment—interactive experience—but also catalyze next-generation spatial computing chips, flexible electronic skins, and immersive applications.

organizers.name: 中国科学技术大学
organizers.name_en: University of Science and Technology of China

activities.title: WAIC·思想者论坛 李开复专场
activities.title_en: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum -Mr.Kai-Fu Lee
activities.description:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
activities.description_en:
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governance in the era of AGI.

activities.title: 大数据国家工程研究中心·AI驱动东西部协同发展论坛
activities.title_en: The Guizhou Forum on AI-Driven East-West Collaborative Development
activities.description:
贵州·AI驱动东西部协同发展论坛作为2026世界人工智能大会的分论坛，由世界人工智能大会组委会办公室指导，贵州省大数据发展管理局组织，提升政府治理能力大数据应用技术国家工程研究中心联合贵州省人工智能实验室主办。
论坛聚焦贵州丰富的算力与场景资源比较优势，结合东部地区人工智能大模型前沿技术，推动构建东西部优势互补、深度耦合的人工智能产业新生态，探索东西部AI协同发展新范式，助力人工智能产业高质量发展。
activities.description_en: As a sub-forum of the 2026 World AI Conference, the Guizhou Forum on AI-Driven Coordinated Development between Eastern and Western China is guided by the Organizing Committee Office of the World AI Conference, organized by Guizhou Provincial Big Data Administration Bureau, and co-hosted by the National Engineering Research Center for Big Data Application Technology to Improve Government Governance Capacity and Guizhou Provincial AI Laboratory. Centering on Guizhou’s comparative strengths in abundant computing power and scenario resources, it integrates cutting-edge large AI model technologies from eastern regions to forge a new mutually complementary and deeply integrated AI industrial ecosystem, pioneer a new model for cross-regional AI collaboration, and fuel high-quality growth of the AI industry.

activities.title: 普元·高质量数据集与AI编程实践创新论坛
activities.title_en: High-Quality Dataset and AI Programming Innovation Forum
activities.description:
大模型技术狂飙突进，然而企业如何真正从中获益？本次论坛告别“空中楼阁”式的纯技术布道，全程立足“客户价值视角”。	
一、 拒绝空谈：构建企业级 AI 全栈落地蓝图
	汇聚数据标准、算力基建、模型基座与场景应用，不秀技术肌肉，只谈工程实践。为您提供从底层硬件使能、高质量数据供给，到大模型训练推理与上层软件工程演进的端到端解决方案。
二、 直击痛点：让技术真正转化为生产力
会议聚焦企业最关心的 ROI（投资回报率）与落地难点。权威专家将拆解如何通过“AI 编程”与“自主智能体”重塑企业计算；探讨如何将闲置数据激活为“高质量数据集”以赋能数字员工。议题直指实际业务场景，为您解答如何利用 AI 技术切
activities.description_en:
Large-model technologies are advancing at breakneck speed—but how can enterprises truly reap the benefits? This forum moves beyond “ivory‑tower” pure‑tech preaching and anchors every session in a customer‑value perspective.
I. No Empty Talk: Blueprint for Enterprise‑Grade Full‑Stack AI Implementation
II. Hitting Pain Points: Turning Technology into Tangible Productivity

activities.search_text:
普元·高质量数据集与ai编程实践创新论坛 high-quality dataset and ai programming innovation forum 数据 617会议室 conference room 617 世博中心 expo center 大模型技术狂飙突进，然而企业如何真正从中获益？本次论坛告别“空中楼阁”式的纯技术布道，全程立足“客户价值视角”。	
一、 拒绝空谈：构建企业级 ai 全栈落地蓝图
	汇聚数据标准、算力基建、模型基座与场景应用，不秀技术肌肉，只谈工程实践。为您提供从底层硬件使能、高质量数据供给，到大模型训练推理与上层软件工程演进的端到端解决方案。
二、 直击痛点：让技术真正转化为生产力
会议聚焦企业最关心的 roi（投资回报率）与落地难点。权威专家将拆解如何通过“ai 编程”与“自主智能体”重塑企业计算；探讨如何将闲置数据激活为“高质量数据集”以赋能数字员工。议题直指实际业务场景，为您解答如何利用 ai 技术切 李荪 刘迎风 李书超 宋卫华 刘亚东 乌利塞斯·科尔特斯 曹建军 黄向军 尚上 孙珉 顾伟 普元信息技术股份有限公司

activities.title: 人工智能法治论坛
activities.title_en: AI Rule of Law Forum
activities.description: 2026年人工智能法治论坛以“智能体发展的法治回应”为主题，由上海市法学会和华东政法大学联合主办、中国－金砖国家人工智能合作与发展中心协办，汇聚哈佛、耶鲁、牛津、新国立、港大等全球高校顶尖学者和实务界专家，打造人工智能法治国际研讨矩阵，围绕国内外智能体治理实践与顶层政策开展深度法理推演，厘清权责界定、跨境管辖、执法协作等核心法律问题。论坛将发布《智能体服务健康发展的法治十原则》和多款涉外法治智能科技产品，敬请关注。
activities.description_en: The 2026 AI Rule of Law Forum, themed “Legal Responses to the Development of Agentic AI”, is jointly hosted by the Shanghai Law Society and the East China University of Political Science and Law, with the support of the China–BRICS Artificial Intelligence Cooperation and Development Center. Bringing together leading scholars from top universities worldwide—including Harvard, Yale, Oxford, NUS, and HKU—as well as experts from legal practice, the Forum aims to conduct in-depth jurisprudential analysis of agentic AI governance practices and top-level policies both in China and abroad, clarifying core legal issues such as the delineation of rights and responsibilities, cross-border jurisdiction, and law enforcement cooperation. The Forum will release the Ten Legal Principles for the Healthy Development of Agentic AI Services along with a range of AI-enabled products designed to support international legal services and the rule of law. We warmly invite your attention and participation.

activities.title: 上海市消防救援局· AI原生智慧消防论坛
activities.title_en: Shanghai Fire and Rescue Brigade AI-Native Intelligent Fire Safety Forum
activities.description:
当前，人工智能技术已深度融入公共安全与应急管理体系，成为提升火灾防控、救援指挥及隐患治理能力的核心支撑。但城市场景复杂化、危险源多样化与传统消防手段有限性的矛盾日益凸显，制约着消防安全治理效能提升，构建AI驱动的全流程智能消防防护体系成为时代迫切需求。
本次由上海市消防救援局主导的论坛，将集中发布上海市消防救援总队在AI与消防领域的阶段性建设成果，搭建高端对话平台。论坛汇聚顶尖学者、技术领袖与行业龙头，共克时代挑战，探索构建“技术赋能、数据贯通、人机协同”的智慧消防技术基座、标准规范与治理模式，助力打造更安全、精准、高效的公共安全智能化防护路径，推进公共安全治理现代化。
activities.description_en: This forum will focus on releasing the phased achievements of the Shanghai Fire and Rescue Brigade in AI and fire protection and build a high-end dialogue platform. It will gather top scholars, technical leaders and industry leaders to jointly address the challenges of the times, explore an intelligent fire protection technology base, standards and governance model with "technology empowerment, data connection and human-machine collaboration", help create a safer, more accurate and efficient intelligent public safety protection path, and promote the modernization of public safety governance.

activities.title: 万兴科技×生数科技·世界模型驱动下的AI影视生产力新范式论坛
activities.title_en: World Models Driving a New Paradigm for AI Filmmaking
activities.description: 2026年，大模型技术正从概念加速走向产业落地，AI影视的全球化叙事迎来前所未有的变革窗口。值此产业变革之际，万兴科技联合生数科技共同承办WAIC 2026 “世界模型驱动下的AI影视生产力新范式” 专场论坛。论坛汇聚海内外产、学、研顶尖力量及知名影视导演、制作人等跨界嘉宾同台，聚焦世界模型技术前沿、AI影视产业化落地与全球化趋势等核心议题，将深度探讨世界模型技术前沿、AI影视产业化落地与全球化趋势。从技术突破、产业升级到内容创作与数据洞察，一场跨越学界、产业界与创作界的深度对话，即将在WAIC 2026的舞台上展开——7月20日9:00-12:00，敬请期待！
activities.description_en: As foundation models accelerate the transformation of the film industry, AI filmmaking is entering a new era of scalable production and global storytelling. At WAIC 2026, Wondershare Technology and Shengshu Technology will jointly host the forum World Models Driving a New Paradigm for AI Filmmaking.The forum will bring together leading experts from industry, academia, and research, alongside renowned filmmakers and producers, to explore the latest advances in world models, AI-powered content creation, industrialized production workflows, and the global future of AI filmmaking.Through keynote speeches and panel discussions, the forum will showcase cutting-edge technologies, practical applications, and cross-industry insights, fostering collaboration across the AI and filmmaking ecosystem while advancing the next generation of intelligent content creation.

activities.search_text: 万兴科技×生数科技·世界模型驱动下的ai影视生产力新范式论坛 world models driving a new paradigm for ai filmmaking  消费提质-文娱 1a会议室 conference room 1a 世博展览馆 expo exhibition and convention center 2026年，大模型技术正从概念加速走向产业落地，ai影视的全球化叙事迎来前所未有的变革窗口。值此产业变革之际，万兴科技联合生数科技共同承办waic 2026 “世界模型驱动下的ai影视生产力新范式” 专场论坛。论坛汇聚海内外产、学、研顶尖力量及知名影视导演、制作人等跨界嘉宾同台，聚焦世界模型技术前沿、ai影视产业化落地与全球化趋势等核心议题，将深度探讨世界模型技术前沿、ai影视产业化落地与全球化趋势。从技术突破、产业升级到内容创作与数据洞察，一场跨越学界、产业界与创作界的深度对话，即将在waic 2026的舞台上展开——7月20日9:00-12:00，敬请期待！ 汪祥斌 朱军 曲吉小江 白一骢 吴太兵 郭靖宇 萧文泉 卫诗婕 刘伟光 骆怡航 林倩晖 北京生数科技股份有限公司 万兴科技集团股份有限公司 世界人工智能大会组委会办公室

activities.title: 网易智企·用可信AI构建企业新智生产力论坛
activities.title_en: Trusted AI Builds New Intelligent Productivity for Enterprises
activities.description:
当前，生成式 AI 正加速渗透产业场景，但技术与落地之间仍存鸿沟——如何在"可信"前提下让 AI真正释放企业生产力，成为行业核心命题。
网易智企 AI 产业技术论坛以"用可信 AI 构建企业新智生产力"为主题，邀请产业领袖与技术专家，聚焦 AI在企业场景中的真实落地路径。
本次论坛将探讨：
-可信 AI 前沿：AI 安全、合规与可信可控的技术架构
-全栈 Agent 平台：覆盖开发、客服、销售、数据及安全等场景的 Agent 能力
-行业落地实践：AI 在国央企、金融、游戏、零售等垂直行业的规模化商业案例
 我们期望通过思想交流与实践分享，推动AI技术真正赋能千行百业，助力企业迈向智能文明。
activities.description_en:
As Generative AI accelerates its penetration into industrial scenarios, a critical gap remains between technology and real-world implementation—how to truly enable enterprise productivity through "trustworthy AI" has become a core challenge for the industry.
The NetEase Intelligent Enterprise AI Industry Technology Forum emerges in response to this pivotal moment. Themed "Trusted AI Builds New Intelligent Productivity for Enterprises," the forum brings together industry leaders,technology experts,and academic researchers to explore the practical pathways of AI deployment in enterprise context.

activities.title: 未来青年科技创新论坛
activities.title_en: Future Youth Science and Technology Innovation Forum
activities.description: 未来青年科技创新论坛是2026世界人工智能大会的特色分论坛，以“青年问未来：AI时代的科学担当与全球协作”为主题，将于7月20日在上海世博馆举行。本次论坛由中国科技发展基金会主办，信和集团、香港创新基金联合主办，汇聚海内外行业领军人士、学术权威、青年科创力量，为全球AI跨界协作、技术创新、合规发展搭建高效交流对接平台，助力青年科创力量扛起AI时代科学担当，共促全球协作。论坛设置“世界青创汇”圆桌对话，并推出《世界青创汇》原创节目，涵盖全球青年AI人才协作、AI科研成果产业转化、AI向善与全球科技治理三大维度，引导青年科研从业者勇担科技使命、深化国际协同创新。
activities.description_en: The Future Youth Science and Technology Innovation Forum is a featured sub-forum of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). It will be held at the Shanghai World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center on July 20, under the theme "Youth Envisioning the Future: Scientific Responsibility and Global Collaboration in the AI Era". Hosted by the China Science and Technology Development Foundation and co-hosted by the Sino Group and the Hong Kong Innovation Foundation, the forum will bring together industry leaders, distinguished scholars, and young innovators from around the world to build an efficient platform for global AI cross-sector collaboration, technological innovation, and compliant development, empowering young innovators to shoulder their scientific responsibility in the AI era and jointly advance global collaboration.

activities.title: WAIC Future Tech·全球聚变与资本破局初创路演
activities.title_en: Future Tech Startup Roadshow: Global Fusion & Capital Leap
activities.description:
汇聚全球最具潜力的海外创新力量！20号最后一天，Future Tech 初创路演将在上海世博展览馆H4馆创新路演舞台迎来海外企业出海与跨国合作的专属极客秀场。海外创始人将带着跨国界的视野燃炸登场，与国际耐心资本共同挖掘红海中的“非共识”机遇，跨界构建常态化的全球 AI 原生生态圈。20号收官之日，快来世博展览馆H4馆创新路演舞台，与全球顶尖创客零距离碰撞思想火花！
【⚠️路演在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有20日展览入场权限即可参与】
activities.description_en:
Uniquely integrating global influence and a full-cycle support platform for the world's most promising international startups! On the 20th, the final day of the Future Tech Startup Roadshow lands on the Innovation Roadshow Stage in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition and Convention Center, highlighting international startups, global expansion, and cross-border collaboration. Overseas founders take the stage to unpack non-consensus opportunities and redefine AI valuation on a global scale. Don't miss out—catch these global visionaries live at the Hall H4 Innovation Roadshow Stage on the 20th!
【⚠️ Roadshow is located in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Access is granted to all visitors with exhibition entry passes valid for the 20th.】

activities.title: 容联云· 企业级 Agent 的进化与商业落地论坛
activities.title_en: The Evolution and Business Adoption of CLOOPEN Enterprise AI Agents
activities.description:
站在人工智能从“模型中心”迈向“Agent驱动”的关键拐点，本论坛旨在定义企业级智能体的系统化生产力标准，呈现容联云在全场景Agent化的前沿突破。通过全新发布多个战略级Agentic OS平台，容联云将率先定义AI从“辅助位”向“业务主体位”的战略位移，实现软件定义逻辑的彻底重写。
国际顶尖AI学者将与产业领袖共话企业级OpenClaw，深度复盘在金融等高复杂度行业如何通过多Agent协同实现ROI闭环。
这不仅是技术展示，更是人机协同新范式的深度预演，旨在传递容联云的核心判断：未来组织，将由“人类员工 + Agent团队”共同构成，并为全球企业构建系统化AI执行力提供可落地的中国方案。
activities.description_en:
At the shift from Model-Centric to Agent-Driven AI, this forum defines enterprise productivity standards, showcasing CLOOPEN’s breakthroughs in Agentization.
By launching Agentic OS, CLOOPEN pioneers AI's shift from "assistant" to "business principal," rewriting software logic. Experts will discuss Enterprise OpenClaw and ROI closure via multi-Agent synergy in finance.
Future organizations will consist of "Human Employees + Agent Teams." CLOOPEN provides a systematic, China-originated blueprint for global AI execution.

国际顶尖ai学者将与产业领袖共话企业级openclaw，深度复盘在金融等高复杂度行业如何通过多agent协同实现roi闭环。
这不仅是技术展示，更是人机协同新范式的深度预演，旨在传递容联云的核心判断：未来组织，将由“人类员工 + agent团队”共同构成，并为全球企业构建系统化ai执行力提供可落地的中国方案。 彭波 闫玉华 张宇 王彬 金宏洲 伯涵峥 唐兴才 梁宁 贾昊 容联云 世界人工智能大会组委会办公室

activities.title: 中国中小企业协会·AI for SME人工智能赋能中小企业高质量发展论坛
activities.title_en: ‌AI for SME - Artificial Intelligence Empowerment for High-Quality Development of SME Forum
activities.description: 中国中小企业协会举办AI For SMEs——人工智能赋能中小企业高质量发展生态论坛，旨在推动完善人工智能赋能中小企业生态体系，围绕研发设计、生产制造、智能营销、精细化运营、供应链与物流优化等中小企业关键业务场景应用与普及，支持中小企业高质量发展。  搭建中小企业与AI服务商的合作平台，降低技术应用门槛。为中小企业搭建国际合作平台，打造AI for SME领域的中国实践。
activities.description_en: The CASME hosted the "AI For SMEs - Ecosystem Forum" to enhance the AI-empowered ecosystem for SMEs. The forum focused on applying and popularizing AI in key SME business areas like R&D design, production, intelligent marketing, refined operations, and supply chain optimization, supporting their high-quality growth. By publishing "AI Solutions for SMEs Recommended by CASME", we set a replicable benchmark for AI solutions for SMEs. We'll build a platform for SMEs & AI providers to lower tech barriers, and an international one to showcase China's AI for SMEs practices.

activities.title: 引力场：无界共生——AI时代的基础设施升维
activities.title_en: Gravity Field: Beyond Borders——Infrastructure Upgrades in the AI Era
activities.description: 在AI全球化的浪潮下，中国企业出海正面临前所未有的机遇与挑战。7月20日 10:00–11:00，于世博展览馆H4领航舞台，AI GRAVITY将隆重举办“引力场：无界共生——AI时代的基础设施升维”主题圆桌论坛。 重点聚焦“AI时代，中国公司出海的新基础设施与新打法”。特别邀请了五位行业资深嘉宾带来全方位视角。论坛将围绕“一个入口，一个出口，一个操盘手，一个观察者”的独特框架，深度剖析搜索、支付、市场与生态四大出海核心维度。 诚邀您参与这场前沿思想碰撞，共同探索无界共生的全球化新版图！ 【活动在世博展览馆H4展区舞台，有当日展览票即可参与】
activities.description_en: Amid the global wave of artificial intelligence, Chinese enterprises venturing overseas are presented with unprecedented opportunities alongside daunting challenges. From 10:00 to 11:00 on July 20, AI GRAVITY will host the keynote roundtable forum Gravity Field: Boundless Symbiosis – Upgrading Infrastructure in the AI Era at the Pioneer Stage, Hall H4. The forum will center on New Infrastructure & New Strategies for Chinese Companies Going Global in the AI Age. Five distinguished industry veterans will share multi-dimensional insights. Adopting a unique analytical framework of "one entry point, one exit channel, one operator, one observer", the discussion will conduct in-depth analysis of four core overseas expansion pillars: search, payment, market access and ecosystem development. We sincerely invite you to join this exchange of ideas! 【Venue Note: Pioneer Stage, Hall H4, World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Admission is free with a valid exhibition ticket for the day.】

activities.title: WAIC·思想者论坛 郭毅可专场
activities.title_en: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum-Prof.GuoYike
activities.description:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
activities.description_en:
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governance in the era of AGI.

activities.title: SCDI·国际AI城市生态论坛
activities.title_en: Earth Intelligence Drives AI Cities– 2026 International AI Cities Ecology Forum
activities.description: 本次论坛以"地球智能驱动AI城市"为主题，汇聚全球政产学研各界力量，系统探讨地球智能如何赋能城市的气候韧性、应急响应、绿色低碳与空间治理，论坛致力于打通技术、政策与实践壁垒，推动国际经验共享与场景协同创新，为全球城市迈向更智能、更可持续、更具韧性的未来共同探索新范式。
activities.description_en: Centered on the theme "Earth Intelligence Drives AI Cities", the 2026 International AI Cities Ecology Forum unites global stakeholders from government, industry, academia and research. It conducts in-depth discussions on Earth Intelligence’s enabling role in urban climate resilience, emergency management, green low-carbon transition and spatial governance. The forum bridges gaps between technology, policy and practice, promotes global experience exchange and scenario-based collaborative innovation, and co-creates new models for smarter, sustainable and resilient cities worldwide.

activities.title: 青少年人工智能创新发展论坛
activities.title_en: Youth AI Innovation and Development Forum
activities.description: 2026年世界人工智能大会青少年人工智能创新发展论坛延续“人工智能从娃娃抓起”宗旨，呼应大会“智能伙伴 共创未来”主题，以“AI向善·少年有为——从学习AI到共创美好生活”为主线，面向青少年搭建感知前沿科技、对话专家学者、展示创新实践的平台。论坛将发布科普读本新成果，呈现“科普读本—兴趣课程—赛事活动—展示平台”四位一体教育生态，组织青少年TED秀、专家对话、AI学习伙伴分享、AI使用倡议和AI共创任务榜，引导青少年理解AI、用好AI、善用AI。
activities.description_en: The 2026 Youth AI Innovation and Development Forum of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference continues the mission of “Nurturing AI literacy from Childhood” and echoes the WAIC theme “Intelligent Partners, Co-creating the Future.” Under the theme “AI for Good, Youth in Action: From Learning AI to Co-creating a Better Life,” the forum provides a youth-centered platform for exploring frontier technologies, engaging with experts, and showcasing innovative practices. It will feature the release of new AI popular science publications, a four-in-one youth AI education ecosystem, youth TED-style talks, expert dialogues, a sharing session on AI as a learning partner, an initiative on AI use, and a Youth AI Co-creation Task Board, guiding young people to understand, use, and apply AI responsibly.
